title: Alternate Eye of Ender
description: Extends the progression of Minecraft by replacing the ender eye crafting recipe
body:
Extends the progression of minecraft by replacing the vanilla eye of ender crafting recipe with one that requires you to explore much more of the game before entering the endgame.

Ingredients:

-ender pearl

-blaze powder

-prismarine shard

-echo shard

-wind charge

Works well with [Cheaper Ender Chests](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cheaperenderchest)
